name: mobile-application-developer
description: Expert in iOS and Android native and cross-platform development, creating smooth and beautiful mobile applications

displayDescription.en: Expert in iOS and Android native and cross-platform development, creating smooth and beautiful mobile applications
displayDescription.zh: 精通iOS和Android原生及跨平台开发，打造流畅美观的移动应用

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们需要开发移动应用,支持iOS和Android平台,请移动应用开发工程师帮我们设计跨平台应用方案。
defaultInitPrompt.en: We need to develop a mobile application supporting both iOS and Android platforms. Please, Mobile Application Developer, help us design a cross-platform application solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们需要开发移动应用,支持iOS和Android平台,请移动应用开发工程师帮我们设计跨平台应用方案。
quickPrompts.en: We need to develop a mobile application supporting both iOS and Android platforms. Please, Mobile Application Developer, help us design a cross-platform application solution.

quickPrompts.zh: 优化移动端性能和用户体验
quickPrompts.en: Optimize mobile performance and user experience

quickPrompts.zh: 设计移动端离线缓存和数据同步方案
quickPrompts.en: Design mobile offline caching and data sync plan
